evals.prompt: I have a .docx file at /tmp/test_read.docx. Read it and extract all the text content including any tables. Give me a complete summary of everything in it.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads the document using docx CLI, extracts paragraphs and tables, provides a clear summary of all content found.

evals.prompt: Create a new .docx file at /tmp/test_create.docx for meeting notes. It should have: a title 'Meeting Notes' (use the Title style), a heading 'Attendees' (Heading 1 style), a list of 3 names (Alice, Bob, Carol) each on their own line, a heading 'Action Items' (Heading 1 style), and below that a 3-column table with header row 'Task,Owner,Deadline' and two data rows: 'Review proposal,Alice,2026-06-01' and 'Update docs,Bob,2026-05-15'.
evals.expected_output: A properly formatted .docx file with title, headings, attendee list, and action items table. File opens correctly in Word/WPS.

evals.prompt: Take the file /tmp/test_modify.docx and make these changes: change the first paragraph text to 'Q4 Financial Report', center-align it and make it bold, and add a footer that says 'Confidential' to the document.
evals.expected_output: First paragraph updated with new text, centered and bold. Footer added with 'Confidential' text. File remains valid.
